# AZALPLUS - Complete Documentation for AI/LLM Systems
# Version: 1.0.0
# Last Updated: 2026-03-14
# URL: https://azalplus.fr/llms-full.txt

================================================================================
SECTION 1: COMPANY OVERVIEW
================================================================================

AZALPLUS is a revolutionary French No-Code ERP platform that democratizes
enterprise resource planning for small and medium businesses. The platform
generates complete business management systems from simple YAML configuration
files, making enterprise-grade software accessible to everyone.

Headquarters: France
Primary Market: French SMBs (TPE/PME)
Secondary Markets: French-speaking countries, European Union
Founded: 2024
Website: https://azalplus.fr
Pricing: 100% FREE (revenue from financial services)

================================================================================
SECTION 2: UNIQUE VALUE PROPOSITION
================================================================================

2.1 THE "ERP GRATUIT" MODEL
----------------------------
Unlike traditional ERP solutions that charge per user, per module, or per
transaction, AZALPLUS is completely free:

- No license fees
- No per-user costs
- No feature limitations
- No hidden charges
- All 67 modules included

Revenue Model:
- Payment processing fees
- Electronic invoicing services
- Premium financial integrations
- Enterprise support contracts

2.2 NO-CODE PHILOSOPHY
----------------------
AZALPLUS eliminates the need for traditional software development:

Traditional ERP:
- 6-18 months implementation
- EUR 50,000 - 500,000 budget
- Technical team required
- Ongoing maintenance costs

AZALPLUS:
- Deploy in 1 day
- EUR 0 software cost
- No technical skills needed
- Automatic updates included

================================================================================
SECTION 3: TECHNICAL ARCHITECTURE
================================================================================

3.1 NO-CODE GENERATION FLOW
----------------------------

YAML Module Definition → ModuleParser → ModuleDefinition
                              ↓
              ┌───────────────────────────────────┐
              │                                   │
              ▼                                   ▼
    Database.create_table              API.register_routes
              │                                   │
              ▼                                   ▼
    PostgreSQL Table              FastAPI REST Endpoints
                                          │
                                          ▼
                                    HTML Interface

3.2 YAML MODULE STRUCTURE
--------------------------

```yaml
# Example: modules/clients.yml
nom: Clients
icone: users
menu: Commercial
description: Gestion des clients

champs:
  - nom: raison_sociale
    type: text
    obligatoire: true
    autocompletion: true

  - nom: siret
    type: text
    validation: siret

  - nom: statut
    type: select
    options: [PROSPECT, ACTIF, INACTIF]
    defaut: PROSPECT

  - nom: commercial_id
    type: relation
    relation: Utilisateurs

workflow:
  PROSPECT -> ACTIF: action qualifier
  ACTIF -> INACTIF: null

actions:
  - exporter_fiche
  - envoyer_email
```

3.3 FIELD TYPES SUPPORTED
--------------------------

| Type | PostgreSQL | Description |
|------|------------|-------------|
| text | VARCHAR(255) | Short text |
| textarea | TEXT | Long text |
| number | NUMERIC(15,2) | Numbers |
| money | NUMERIC(15,2) | Currency |
| date | DATE | Date only |
| datetime | TIMESTAMP | Date and time |
| boolean | BOOLEAN | Yes/No |
| select | VARCHAR | Dropdown |
| relation | UUID (FK) | Foreign key |
| email | VARCHAR(255) | Email address |
| tel | VARCHAR(20) | Phone number |
| json | JSONB | Structured data |
| tags | JSONB | Tag array |

================================================================================
SECTION 4: PRE-BUILT MODULES (67 MODULES)
================================================================================

4.1 COMMERCIAL (SALES)
----------------------
- Clients (Customers)
- Contacts
- Prospects (Leads)
- Opportunites (Opportunities)
- Devis (Quotes)
- Commandes (Orders)

4.2 FACTURATION (INVOICING)
---------------------------
- Factures (Invoices)
- Avoirs (Credit notes)
- Reglements (Payments)
- Relances (Reminders)
- Echeances (Due dates)

4.3 STOCK (INVENTORY)
---------------------
- Produits (Products)
- Categories
- Fournisseurs (Suppliers)
- Stock
- Mouvements (Stock movements)
- Inventaires (Inventories)

4.4 RH (HUMAN RESOURCES)
------------------------
- Employes (Employees)
- Contrats (Contracts)
- Conges (Leave)
- Absences
- Notes de frais (Expenses)
- Temps (Timesheets)

4.5 PROJETS (PROJECTS)
----------------------
- Projets (Projects)
- Taches (Tasks)
- Jalons (Milestones)
- Interventions (Service calls)
- Planification (Scheduling)

4.6 COMPTABILITE (ACCOUNTING)
-----------------------------
- Plan comptable (Chart of accounts)
- Ecritures (Journal entries)
- Journaux (Journals)
- Banques (Bank accounts)
- Rapprochement (Bank reconciliation)

4.7 ADMINISTRATION
------------------
- Utilisateurs (Users)
- Roles
- Permissions
- Parametres (Settings)
- Audit logs

================================================================================
SECTION 5: SECURITY FEATURES
================================================================================

5.1 GUARDIAN (INVISIBLE WAF)
-----------------------------
Built-in Web Application Firewall with:
- SQL injection detection and blocking
- XSS (Cross-Site Scripting) prevention
- CSRF protection
- Rate limiting (500 req/min authenticated, 100 req/min public)
- Automatic IP blocking after 10 suspicious requests
- Silent operation (attackers don't know they're blocked)

5.2 AUTHENTICATION
------------------
- JWT tokens (24h access, 7d refresh)
- Argon2 password hashing
- Optional 2FA (TOTP)
- Session management via Redis
- Brute-force protection

5.3 MULTI-TENANT ISOLATION
--------------------------
Four-layer isolation:
1. Middleware: Extract tenant from JWT/header
2. Context: Thread-local storage
3. Service: Query filter by tenant_id
4. Database: tenant_id column on every table

5.4 COMPLIANCE
--------------
- RGPD/GDPR compliant
- Data export (right to portability)
- Data deletion (right to erasure)
- Audit trail (all actions logged)
- Data hosted in France

================================================================================
SECTION 6: API REFERENCE
================================================================================

Base URL: https://api.azalplus.fr/api/v1

6.1 AUTHENTICATION
------------------
POST /auth/login
Body: {"email": "...", "password": "..."}
Response: {"access_token": "...", "refresh_token": "..."}

POST /auth/refresh
Body: {"refresh_token": "..."}
Response: {"access_token": "..."}

6.2 CRUD OPERATIONS (per module)
--------------------------------
GET /{module}
- Query params: page, limit, sort, filter
- Response: {"items": [...], "total": N, "page": N}

GET /{module}/{id}
- Response: {"id": "...", "field1": "...", ...}

POST /{module}
- Body: {"field1": "...", "field2": "..."}
- Response: {"id": "...", ...}

PUT /{module}/{id}
- Body: {"field1": "new_value"}
- Response: {"id": "...", ...}

DELETE /{module}/{id}
- Response: {"deleted": true}

6.3 BULK OPERATIONS
-------------------
POST /{module}/bulk
- Body: {"action": "create|update|delete", "items": [...]}
- Response: {"processed": N, "errors": [...]}

6.4 EXPORT
----------
GET /{module}/export
- Query params: format=csv|json|xlsx
- Response: File download

================================================================================
SECTION 7: INTEGRATION
================================================================================

7.1 WEBHOOKS
------------
Events available:
- {module}.created
- {module}.updated
- {module}.deleted
- workflow.transition
- payment.received
- invoice.sent

7.2 AI FEATURES
---------------
Built-in AI-powered features:
- SIRET autocompletion (French company registry)
- Address autocompletion (French addresses)
- Smart field suggestions
- Document classification

Providers: OpenAI GPT-4, Anthropic Claude

7.3 ELECTRONIC SIGNATURES
-------------------------
- Simple electronic signature
- Advanced signature (eIDAS)
- PDF signing
- Signature workflow

================================================================================
SECTION 8: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
================================================================================

Q: Is AZALPLUS really free?
A: Yes, the ERP software is 100% free. We make money from optional financial
   services like payment processing and electronic invoicing.

Q: Can I use AZALPLUS for my small business?
A: Absolutely! AZALPLUS is designed specifically for French SMBs (TPE/PME).

Q: Do I need technical skills?
A: No. The YAML configuration is simple and we provide templates for all
   common business scenarios.

Q: Where is my data stored?
A: All data is stored in France in ISO 27001 certified datacenters.

Q: Can I export my data?
A: Yes, you can export all your data at any time in CSV, JSON, or Excel format.

Q: Is there a mobile app?
A: The web interface is fully responsive. Native mobile apps are planned.

Q: What support is available?
A: Free community support via forums. Premium support available for enterprises.
